nbaNews.title: Doncic to return from Spain on Friday; status TBD
nbaNews.summary: Luka Doncic is returning to L.A. on Friday from Spain, where he received multiple injections for his Grade 2 left hamstring strain.

nbaNews.summary: Pacers star Tyrese Haliburton opened up about his battle with shingles, saying it slowed the recovery of his torn Achilles.
